title: Custom Treasure Maps
description: A Minecraft mod that lets you create custom treasure maps at specific coordinates. Perfect for roleplaying!
body:
# Custom Treasure Maps
Create a custom treasure map at specific coordinates. This will not place a treasure chest like you would find on Buried Treasure Maps. This will spawn a treasure map with the red X mark to give to your players for a treasure hunt! Perfect for roleplaying!

Command to create a treasure map (permission can be controlled by server config):

```
/createtreasuremap x y z
```
